summary: Frontend-only testing of 5 feature groups: filter pill styling, honeycomb pattern resize, ISO budget text fix, Twitter-level performance (feed caching, optimistic updates), and threaded comment replies. All code implementations verified correct.
critical_code_review_comments: HivePage.js lines 894-908: Filter pills correctly use inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-4 py-1.5, whiteSpace: nowrap, and flex-shrink-0 on emoji span
index.css lines 39-51: Honeycomb background correctly sized 42px 75px (25% smaller) with opacity 0.12 (increased from 0.08)
PostCards.js line 614: ISO budget logic correctly shows 'Up to $X' when only max price exists, '$X – $Y' for both, 'From $X' for only min
HivePage.js lines 533-557: Feed caching via sessionStorage key 'hg_feed_cache' implemented
HivePage.js lines 604-616: Cache hydration on mount for instant display
HivePage.js lines 154-213: Optimistic comments show instantly, replace with server data on success, revert on failure
HivePage.js lines 227-249: Optimistic comment likes toggle instantly with revert on failure
HivePage.js lines 216-225: Reply handler correctly calls focus() and scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center' })
CommentItem.js lines 60-95: CommentThread shows 'View X more replies' toggle when replies.length > 3, collapses to first 2 replies by default
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 feature groups verified: 1) Filter pills have correct inline-flex, items-center, px-4 py-1.5, whitespace-nowrap, flex-shrink-0 on emoji, 2) Honeycomb pattern is 42px 75px with 0.12 opacity, 3) ISO budget shows 'Up to $X' format for max-only (tested in code, live data showed range format which is also correct), 4) Feed caching works with sessionStorage 'hg_feed_cache', 5) Optimistic comments/likes implemented with revert on failure, 6) Reply auto-focus + scrollIntoView working, 7) CommentThread 'View Replies' toggle appears for 3+ replies (not tested live due to no threads with enough replies). Some 503 errors in console during testing but app functioned correctly.

filter_pill_styling.display: flex (inline-flex in code, computed as flex)

iso_budget_format.code_logic: 'Up to $max' when only max, '$min – $max' for both, 'From $min' for only min
iso_budget_format.live_test: Found '$40 – $55', '$45 – $60' (range format correct, no max-only ISOs found to test 'Up to' format)

optimistic_comments.implementation: Lines 154-213 HivePage.js - shows instantly, replaces on success, reverts on failure

optimistic_comment_likes.implementation: Lines 227-249 HivePage.js - toggles instantly, reverts on failure

view_replies_toggle.live_test: Not found (no threads with 3+ replies in test data)

playwright_ui: Feed cache in sessionStorage - PASS (20 posts)
code_review: ISO 'Up to $X' format logic in PostCards.js - VERIFIED
Optimistic comment submission in HivePage.js - VERIFIED
Optimistic comment like with revert in HivePage.js - VERIFIED
CommentThread View Replies toggle in CommentItem.js - VERIFIED
